title: Encryption Architecture Brief
snippet: Documents are encrypted with TLS 1.3 in transit and AES-256 at rest. Key operations are separated from application operators.

title: SOC 2 Type II Summary
snippet: The latest completed SOC 2 Type II review covers the period ending March 2026. A bridge letter is available for approved prospects.

title: Retention Policy v2026.02
snippet: Workspace admins can select 30, 90, 180 or 365 day retention windows for generated artifacts and source uploads.

title: Regional Processing Design Note
snippet: The architecture supports region-restricted processing for the pilot environment, but cross-region backup controls require legal review before firm residency commitments.

title: Product Capability Matrix
snippet: PDF risk summaries can be generated from approved templates and must be reviewed before they are shared outside the workspace.

title: Incident Response Policy v2024.11
snippet: The previous policy draft listed a 72 hour notification target, but the policy owner has not confirmed the current version.

title: Subprocessor Review Register
snippet: Subprocessors are reviewed quarterly and material updates are posted to the customer trust center after security review.

title: Pilot Launch Plan
snippet: A controlled pilot usually launches in 21 to 30 days when security review, workspace configuration and buyer acceptance testing are complete.

title: EU Residency Gap Note
snippet: No approved statement currently supports an unconditional EU-only processing promise for every document workflow.

title: Support Addendum Draft
snippet: The support addendum mentions a premium uptime target, but commercial approval is required before quoting it in a customer RFP.

title: Prior Pilot Answer
snippet: Previous pilot responses described a four-week rollout with buyer-provided test data and a named business owner.

title: Reviewer Workflow Control
snippet: Customer-facing summaries require reviewer approval when they include compliance, availability or region-specific commitments.
